sources.name: Minecraft Bedrock vanilla resource pack
sources.description: Default block colors are generated from local vanilla blocks.json, terrain_texture.json, and block PNG averages with top-face priority.
sources.license: Minecraft Bedrock vanilla resource pack terms apply to the source assets; this repository stores only derived aggregate color values.

sources.description: Project-authored fallback colors generated from block identifiers, material categories, and deterministic color rules for missing resource-pack mappings.
sources.license: MIT OR Apache-2.0 as part of this repository

sources.name: Minecraft Wiki Bedrock Edition block ID reference
sources.license: Minecraft Wiki content license applies to the reference page; used for identifiers only, not copied color values or icons.
